use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HYPERTENSION IN PATIENTS WHO ARE IN NEED OF A LIQUID COMPOSITION OF TERAZOSIN
TREATMENT OF SYMPTOMATIC BENIGN PROSTATIC HYPERPLASIA (BPH) IN PATIENTS WHO ARE IN NEED OF A LIQUID COMPOSITION OF TERAZOSIN

indications.text:
1.1 Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia
TEZRULY is indicated for the treatment of the signs and symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia
(BPH) in adult males [see Clinical Studies (14.1)].
1.2 Hypertension
TEZRULY is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure in adults [see Clinic...
